title: REAL copper update
body:
**SUPER MEGA COOL UPDATE COPPER INSPIRED 25W32A**

WITH THIS RESOURCE PACK THE GAME WILL HAVE MEDMAZ (an untranslatable Russian pun) FROM WHICH YOU CAN MAKE MEDMAZ ARMOR AND TOOLS, AND YOU CAN ALSO GET INTO A NEW DIMENSION CONSISTING ONLY OF COPPER, THERE ARE COPPERMEN, A COPPER DRAGON, AND MANY OTHER COOL THINGS!!!!!!

haha, initially, I was inspired by this ironic message of my friend about the new snapshot where there was a lot of copper, so I decided to make it even CRAZIER

![Added green copper torch. Crafted from copper nugget, coal and stick. Added copper rods. Oxidizes. Added copper chain. Oxidizes. Added copper lantern. Oxidizes. Copper hatch is now crafted from 4 ingots, not 6  I suggest adding a copper dimension and having a copper dragon and coppermen there, and even shorter, add copper ore from which copper armor will be crafted, and shorter, uh, add a copper creeper, unlike the usual one, it will be green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8018298354b6675ac405e3dd5b122edb08a48c50_0.webp)

"Added green copper torch. Crafted from copper nugget, coal and stick.
Added copper rods. Oxidizes.
Added copper chain. Oxidizes.
Added copper lantern. Oxidizes.
Copper hatch is now crafted from 4 ingots, not 6

I suggest adding a copper dimension and having a copper dragon and coppermen there, and even shorter, add copper ore from which copper armor will be crafted, and shorter, uh, add a copper creeper, unlike the usual one, it will be green"

Telegram Channel: https://t.me/CuboMods
